name: AETHER_01
description: Full-spectrum Windows MCP server — process, file, registry, service, GUI, system, network, user, security, automation
author: foursecondfivefour

tools.name: process_control
tools.description: Manage Windows processes — list, kill, create, set priority, threads, CPU affinity, loaded modules, DLL injection

tools.name: file_system
tools.description: Windows file operations — read/write/delete, ACL management, symbolic links, alternate data streams, EFS, volumes, network shares

tools.name: registry_editor
tools.description: Windows Registry access — read/write/delete, hive enumeration, security descriptors, change monitoring, offline hive mounting

tools.name: service_manager
tools.description: Windows Service management — list, start/stop/restart, configuration change, triggers, kernel driver control

tools.name: gui_automation
tools.description: Windows GUI automation — mouse control, keyboard input, window management, screenshots, clipboard, display config, audio control

tools.name: system_info
tools.description: Windows system information — CPU, memory, disk, OS version, power/battery, devices, BIOS, NTP, installed software, Windows updates, BCD

tools.name: network_manager
tools.description: Windows network management — adapters, connections, DNS config, firewall rules, proxy settings, routing table, WiFi networks, VPN, Bluetooth

tools.name: user_management
tools.description: Windows user administration — users, groups, sessions, security policies, certificates, credential manager, access token manipulation

tools.name: security_audit
tools.description: Windows security auditing — audit policy, UAC config, Defender status, AppLocker rules, BitLocker, TPM, Secure Boot, exploit protection

tools.name: system_automation
tools.description: Windows automation — Event Log query/subscribe, Scheduled Tasks create/delete/run, safe WMI SELECT queries

prompts.name: system_status
prompts.description: Analyze CPU, memory, disk, and OS health with optional service and process details

prompts.name: diagnostic_report
prompts.description: Generate a structured troubleshooting report with recent event logs and optional Defender status

prompts.name: security_posture
prompts.description: Assess Windows security posture — UAC, Defender, BitLocker, TPM, with optional AppLocker policy analysis

resources.name: cpu_info
resources.description: Live CPU metrics — usage, temperature, load

resources.name: memory_info
resources.description: Live memory metrics — total, used, available, page file

resources.name: os_info
resources.description: OS version, build, edition, install date

resources.name: disk_info
resources.description: Disk usage — capacity, free space, health

resources.name: battery_info
resources.description: Battery status — charge level, health, cycle count

resources.name: installed_software
resources.description: List of installed software from Registry
